ground_truth.title: HR Outsourcing Services | Human Resource Consulting Group
ground_truth.main_content: The Human Resource Consulting Group provides comprehensive HR Services with a personal touch. Our team of experts can provide everything your business needs from complete HR outsourcing, to individual services like policy and procedure reviews. We're here to become your full-time HR team, or supplement staff where needed. With our flexible services, state-of-the-art technology, and world-class client support, anything is possible. We recognize that the needs of each business we work with are different, and we take pride in getting to understand our clients individually to create tailored and cost-effective solutions for payroll, risk management, HR administration, workforce management, and employee benefits management. HRCG has become a premier provider of human resource services by partnering with business owners and entrepreneurs to manage their most important asset – people. Our primary differentiation is a high-touch service model coupled with technology and expertise. With HRCG, you get a team of certified HR professionals who provide proactive strategies that deliver positive outcomes for your business. Services include: Core HR Strategy - Align HR strategy to objectives, and develop policies and procedures with continuing support. Recruitment/Staffing - Develop recruitment strategy and provide support on screening, applicant tracking, interviewing, enrollment and onboarding. Mergers, Acquisition, and Divestiture Support - Ensure HR due diligence with HR integration support and develop communication and retention strategy. Employee Leave Administration - Provide administrative processing, respond to employee inquiries and coordinate benefits with vendors. HR Administration - Provide guidance on employee HR records, employee life cycle management, communication, and compliance measures. Benefits Administration - Track employee benefit eligibility and change of status and manage employee termination and open enrollment. Employee Relations - Address and document policy related questions and respond to employee queries; investigate employee complaints. Performance Management - Develop and implement performance management systems and monitor workplace investigations.
